sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47046" key="h(mia/staton" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμι-άστᾰτον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n47046.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the half-indefinite</tr_>, a figure of speech expressing certainty as to the genus but doubt as to the species (e.g. Virg.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Aen.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.352</biblScope> </bibl>), Sacerd.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.469K.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
